blood.name: Blood
blood.description: Your blood does not have enough iron to carry oxygen to all parts of your body.

eyes.name: Eyes
eyes.description: Without enough Vitamin A, your eyes cannot adjust to see in dim or dark places.

bones.name: Bones
bones.description: Without enough Vitamin D, bones become soft and weak, causing pain and deformity in children.

lungs.name: Lungs
lungs.description: Low Vitamin C weakens the lungs and makes it harder to breathe during exercise or illness.

stomach.name: Stomach
stomach.description: Without enough dietary fiber, digestion slows down, causing stomach pain, bloating, and discomfort.

brain.name: Brain
brain.description: The brain needs Omega-3 fatty acids to build nerve connections and focus properly.

skin.name: Skin
skin.description: Without enough Vitamin E, skin becomes dry, itchy, and inflamed.

heart.name: Heart
heart.description: Low potassium can cause irregular heartbeat and weaken the heart muscles over time.

small_intestine.name: Small Intestine
small_intestine.description: Without enough zinc, the small intestine cannot properly absorb nutrients from food.

large_intestine.name: Large Intestine
large_intestine.description: Without enough dietary fiber, the large intestine moves waste too slowly, causing constipation.
